name: thread-continuity
description: Local-only continuity search for Codex agent threads and resume packets.

interface.shortDescription: Find prior agent threads and build safe resume packets.
interface.longDescription: Thread Continuity indexes local Codex session history read-only, ranks likely continuation threads, and returns compact resume packets with source refs, confidence, warnings, and staleness labels.
defaultPrompt: Pack the last blocker and proof.
